SoSweet

Local PI for the ANR SoSweet project.

According to the archived page, the project studied links between linguistic variation and social structure on Twitter, both synchronically and diachronically. The local contribution highlighted linguistic enrichment workflows as well as the production of clusters and embeddings from a very large tweet collection.
